zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Corbet於1389年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾麗頓時，她的父親John de Corbet III35歲，母親Joan Leighton19歲。她於大約1404年與William Brereton在英國英格蘭史洛普爾麗頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1458年9月8日在英國英格蘭爾切斯特享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾切斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Corbet于1389年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾麗頓时，她的父亲John de Corbet III35岁，母亲Joan Leighton19岁。她于大约1404年与William Brereton在英国英格兰史洛普爾麗頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1458年9月8日在英国英格兰爾切斯特享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾切斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Corbet was born in 1389, in Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Wales, her father, John de Corbet III, was 35 and her mother, Joan Leighton, was 19. She married William Brereton about 1404, in Leighton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 8 September 1458, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Corbet est née en 1389, à Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, John de Corbet III, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan Leighton, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William Brereton environ 1404, à Leighton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 septembre 1458, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, U: Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Corbet 1389 in Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Corbet III 35 und ihre Mutter Joan Leighton 19. Sie hat um 1404 in Leighton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom William Brereton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. September 1458 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Corbet è nata il nel 1389 nel Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Galles, sua padre, John de Corbet III, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Joan Leighton, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato William Brereton circa 1404, nel Leighton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 settembre 1458, nel Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Corbetが1389年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアレイトンで生まれた時，父John de Corbet IIIは35歳，母Joan Leightonは19歳であった。約1404年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアレイトンでWilliam Breretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1458年9月8日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, U: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레이턴 비 네스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Corbet(이)가 1389년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Corbet III(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Leighton(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 레이턴에서 William Brereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 9월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, U: Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Corbet nasceu em 1389, em Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, John de Corbet III, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Joan Leighton, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com William Brereton aproximadamente 1404, em Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1458, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Leighton by Neston, Cheshire, England, U: лиитон би нестон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Corbet родилась в 1389 г. в местности лиитон, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени John de Corbet III было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Leighton, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Brereton около 1404 г. в местности лиитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 8 сентября 1458 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Corbet nació en 1389, en Leighton, Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, John de Corbet III, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Joan Leighton, tenía 19 años. Se casó con William Brereton aproximadamente 1404, en Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1458, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
